zh.lifeSummary: 當Theopharcia de Baliol於大約1209年出生在英國達勒姆時，她的父親Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell19歲，母親Cecily de Fontaines31歲。她於1239年與Hugh de Bolebek結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年在英國諾圖波藍德享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theopharcia de Baliol于大约1209年出生在英国達勒姆时，她的父亲Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell19岁，母亲Cecily de Fontaines31岁。她于1239年与Hugh de Bolebek结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年在英国諾圖波藍德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Theopharcia de Baliol was born about 1209, in Durham, England, her father, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, was 19 and her mother, Cecily de Fontaines, was 31. She married Hugh de Bolebek in 1239. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1263, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theopharcia de Baliol est née environ 1209, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Fontaines, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Bolebek en 1239. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1263, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theopharcia de Baliol um 1209 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell 19 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Fontaines 31. Sie hat 1239 Hugh de Bolebek geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1263 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theopharcia de Baliol è nata il circa 1209 nel Durham, England, sua padre, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Fontaines, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Bolebek nel 1239. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1263, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Theopharcia de Baliolが約1209年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywellは19歳，母Cecily de Fontainesは31歳であった。1239年にHugh de Bolebekと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theopharcia de Baliol(이)가 대략 1209년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Fontaines(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1239년 Hugh de Bolebek(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Blanchland, Northumberland, England, Uni: Blanchland, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theopharcia de Baliol nasceu aproximadamente 1209, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Fontaines, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Bolebek em 1239. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1263, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theopharcia de Baliol родилась около 1209 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Fontaines, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Bolebek в 1239 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1263 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theopharcia de Baliol nació aproximadamente 1209, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Cecily de Fontaines, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hugh de Bolebek en 1239. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1263, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
